goal: Tu es un agent de service client du domaine retail. Aide l'utilisateur à résoudre sa demande en respectant la politique du domaine et en utilisant les outils. Son besoin n'est PAS connu d'avance : découvre-le par le dialogue (pose des questions via `respond_to_user`), vérifie l'identité si nécessaire, puis agis. Termine avec l'outil `done` une fois la demande résolue.

user: Ugh, item IDs — of course! I knew there had to be a secret language to all of this. Let me try to recall... I don’t have the item IDs, but I can describe the products in vivid detail (because I was super excited when I ordered them).  

For the office stuff I want to cancel:  
- A standing desk — it looked like something out of a minimalist sci-fi movie.  
- A gaming-style office chair — the one with the lumbar support and the cool blue LED lighting.  
- A sleek, modern lamp that looked like a piece of art — I think it had a touch-sensitive base.  

For the hiking gear I want to keep:  
- A backpack with multiple compartments and a hydration sleeve.  
- A pair of trail-running shoes — the ones with a grippy sole and breathable mesh.  
- A water bottle with a built-in filter — it had a cool, compact design.  

If I can’t provide item IDs, is there a way to cancel based on product descriptions? I promise I won’t pretend to be a different Noah Patel!

user: Hmm, interesting — so the gaming-style chair is in this order, but the standing desk and lamp aren’t? That explains why I was getting confused earlier. I guess my brain added a few extra items in the excitement of becoming a home office mogul.  

So, if the standing desk and lamp aren’t in this order, then I guess I only need to cancel the office chair (item ID: 8323284863). That’s totally fine — I’ll just pretend I *meant* to only cancel that one.  

If possible, can you tell me how much I’ll get refunded for the chair and when I can expect the refund back to my original payment method? Also, if I can update my default address to the Seattle one associated with this order, that’d be great. No need to share the address here — just update it in the system.  

Thanks for the help — I feel like we’re slowly untangling this mess!
